# Static Labs

AI and Machine Learning Research Laboratory specialized in **Human-Computer Interaction (HCI)** and workflow-native intelligence. Static Labs focuses on making AI easier to understand, control, and use in complex professional environments.

## Core Projects

- **Thunder**: A diffusion-based language model designed for low-latency conversation, short code completion, and fluid Human-Computer Interaction (HCI). It prioritizes immediate response without sacrificing quality.
- **Statsparrot**: An autonomous no-ETL data engineering system. It connects data sources, produces automated insights, and recommends operational decisions through confidence bands and signal maps.
- **Pixtooth**: A specialized dental charting platform powered by machine learning. It supports auto-charting and clinician-reviewed documentation, focusing on precision and speed in medical diagnostics.

## Mission & Philosophy

- **Human-Computer Interaction (HCI)**: Moving from intention to outcome with minimal friction.
- **Human Control by Design**: Keeping expertise, review, and responsibility visible in AI workflows.
- **Visible Reasoning**: AI systems should expose how they reached results, avoiding the "black box" problem.
- **Practical Prototyping**: Building working systems to test research in real-world professional environments.

## Technical Context

- **Location**: Based in Bucharest, Romania.
- **Expertise**: LLM Optimization, Data Engineering, Autonomous Systems, and Interface Design.
- **Contact**: hello@staticlabs.ro
- **Website**: https://staticlabs.ro
